Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the Test Engineer position at RateS. Your focus on maintaining testing frameworks and improving efficiency through new tools aligns perfectly with my background in software quality and automation.

At EXAIL Robotics, I currently develop core features in C++ and JavaScript while handling continuous bug resolution. I also redesigned our installation process. It used to take about 2 days, but now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. This 85% reduction in deployment time shows my commitment to making technical processes more reliable and efficient.

On the side, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack platform using React and Supabase. It includes a daily scraper for 1,300+ listings and an AI agent to process data. This project required building robust error handling and data validation systems which are essential for high-quality software testing.

I am finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I look forward to the possibility of helping RateS maintain its high standards for product reliability and customer satisfaction.

Aodren Gloux

points_negatifs: Demande des compétences spécifiques en PLC (Beckhoff) et robots industriels que le candidat n'a pas explicitement (profil plus orienté logiciel/C++)
Localisation à Singapour sans mention de visa

Bien que le profil d'Aodren soit plus orienté Software Engineering généraliste, son expérience actuelle chez EXAIL Robotics sur des systèmes d'eye-tracking et l'automatisation de processus de déploiement constitue un excellent point d'entrée pour ce poste.

commentaire: L'offre correspond bien au profil d'Aodren avec une forte composante full-stack et micro-services. Son expérience en automation et ses projets React/SQL sont directement transférables.
cover_letter:
Dear Hiring Team,

I'm applying for the Software Developer role at AvePoint. Your focus on end to end application delivery and microservices aligns perfectly with my background in building scalable web architectures.

I currently develop and maintain software at EXAIL Robotics using C++ and JavaScript. On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack React application with Supabase auth and PostgreSQL. This project involved managing complex data flows and generating automated reports, similar to the technical documentation and system integration tasks mentioned in your job description.

I also redesigned the installation process at my current company. It used to take about 2 days. Now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That's an 85% reduction in deployment time. I enjoy finding these kinds of efficiencies in the development lifecycle.

I'm finishing my M.S. in Information Systems Engineering. I've followed AvePoint's growth in the data management space and would value the chance to contribute to your engineering team in Singapore.

Aodren Gloux

stack: SQL, Java, .NET, MS D365, ITSM tools
points_positifs: Poste Entry-level parfaitement adapté au profil
Exigence de compétences en SQL et Java correspondant au parcours d'Aodren
Forte dimension résolution de problèmes et amélioration de processus
points_negatifs: Poste orienté 'Operations/Support' plutôt que pur développement
Mention de MS D365 que le candidat ne maîtrise pas
commentaire: Une excellente opportunité junior chez un géant de la tech à Singapour. Le rôle demande une capacité à automatiser et améliorer l'existant, ce qui match avec l'expérience d'Aodren chez Exail.

Dear Hiring Team,

I am applying for the E-Commerce System Operation Engineer role at Xiaomi. Your focus on diagnosing system problems and improving operational data analysis matches my experience in technical troubleshooting and workflow optimization.

It used to take about 2 days, but now it takes 2 hours and anyone on the team can run it. That is an 85% reduction in deployment time.

On my own time, I built ValoFenua, a full-stack platform using PostgreSQL and automated scrapers. This project required me to maintain database integrity and resolve complex data issues daily, which aligns with the SQL and system support requirements of this role.
